query: UPDATE users SET crmEmail = 'hello@loupr.com' WHERE openId = (SELECT ownerOpenId FROM (SELECT value AS ownerOpenId FROM system_settings WHERE key = 'ownerOpenId' LIMIT 1) t) OR email = (SELECT email FROM users WHERE role = 'super_admin' ORDER BY createdAt ASC LIMIT 1);
